summary: Full backend + frontend regression for current Tasbih.ai sprint (invite gate, MSG91 WhatsApp OTP, Noor Moment, Calendar, Quran reader, branding refresh). 25/25 pytest backend tests pass in 7.3s covering: /api/health, founder-code seed integrity (30 docs, founder:true, issued_by:'system'), /api/invite/verify (identical→400, founder-pair→200 with 20-min pending_token, same-issuer non-founder→400 'two different members'), /api/invites/create unlimited (6 in a row), /api/auth/otp/send (invalid pending→403), /api/auth/otp/verify (wrong→400+attempt-inc, expired→400 'expired', 5-wrong→429, correct→200 creates user + consumes both codes + 90-day session via mongo hash-injection technique to avoid real WA spam), /api/quran/surahs (114), /api/quran/surah/1?lang=en (7 ayahs with ar+tr, English Saheeh International), /api/quran/surah/1?lang=ur (7 ayahs Urdu), /api/quran/languages (≥9: en/en2/ur/fr/tr/id/ru/es/de), /api/calendar/today (hijri object + upcoming), /api/calendar/month for 2026-03 (navroz/chandraat/lailat/eid) and 2026-12 (Salgirah on 2026-12-13), /api/communities/{id}/noor-moment (kind='noor_moment', text ≤360 chars), Noor Moment 60s rate-limit 429 'still resting', and regression of /auth/me /noor/today /tasbih/state /communities /jamatkhanas (count=99) /profile/sangat /noor/digest. Frontend mobile (390x844) e2e verified via Playwright: /login shows greeting 'Yā ʿAlī Madad', 128px-tall logo, invite-only gate; entering EK48P89X + S4YNQFPK transitions to register form with name/email/phone fields (phone EMPTY, no 8108888330 pre-fill) and country picker showing 14 codes (+1/+91/+44/+971/+92/+33/+49/...); /home shows 'Yā ʿAlī Madad', home-digest-card present, header logo h=48px (h-12), Noor of the Day verse loads (Surah Ad-Duhā 93:7–8); /calendar renders Hijri header card (4 Dhu al-Hijjah 1447 AH · Thursday), 'Next up: Day of Arafah', month grid, 'All events this month' list with Chandraat; /quran shows Read + Reflections tabs, 114 surah-N test ids, tapping surah-1 displays Arabic + English (Saheeh International) translation, language selector with 9 options, 'Reflect with Noor' CTA; /circles/c_spiritual/chat shows gold-sparkles noor-moment-btn next to composer — tap renders cinematic emerald+gold 'NOOR MOMENT · INVITED BY <name>' card with AI reflection, second tap within 60s shows 'Noor is still resting. Try again in 56s.' rate-limit message. No critical issues found.

minor.issue: Did not exercise the live MSG91 WhatsApp call against +918108888330 to avoid spamming the owner's number (per testing instructions). Backend code path looks correct: build hashed OTP, persist with 10-min expiry, await _send_wa_otp_msg91, return channel:'whatsapp'. Validation paths (403 on bad pending_token) tested and pass. Recommend manual one-shot live verification by owner during deploy.

issues: A small burst of /api/auth/me 401s appears in console before the invite-gate form is shown — unauthenticated probe is expected with invite gate ON; consider gating /auth/me behind a localStorage token check to silence the noise.

The Noor Moment message DOM uses testid pattern data-testid='noor-moment-<message_id>' (per spec) but no static data-testid='noor-moment-msg' wrapper is emitted on individual cards — works but makes selecting 'the latest noor moment' from tests slightly harder. Cards themselves render correctly with INVITED BY label, emerald+gold styling, and ai reflection text.

action_items: Owner: perform a single live /api/auth/otp/send to +918108888330 to confirm MSG91 'nevika_otp_verify' template fires end-to-end and log shows 'MSG91 WA OTP sent ... request_id: ...' (we deliberately skipped to avoid OTP spam).
Optional: gate /api/auth/me call on the /login page behind a token-present check so first paint doesn't emit 401s in console.
Optional: also emit a static data-testid='noor-moment-msg' on each Noor Moment chat card (in addition to the per-message id) for easier e2e selection.
critical_code_review_comments: /api/auth/otp/verify uses hmac.compare_digest on hashes — good. OTP attempts counter is incremented on wrong code and gated at >=5 with 429 — confirmed working. 90-day session expiry confirmed via direct DB inspection (89–90d delta).

Founder-bypass branch is correct: is_founder = bool(d1.founder) or bool(d2.founder) — even a founder-paired-with-member combination bypasses the same-issuer check; if owner wants stricter semantics later (both must be founder OR both must be different issuers) this would need refining.

server.py is now 2808 lines — well past the 700-line guideline. Calendar, Quran, Noor Moment, Invites, OTP, and Communities all live in one monolith. Suggest splitting into routers (still no functional impact).

Cookie-based session_token is set on otp/verify with secure=True, samesite='none' — correct for cross-site frontend. Be aware: when bearer + cookie both present, the backend prefers Cookie (see current_user fn line 132); tests must clear cookies after a session-invalidating cleanup to avoid stale-cookie 401s — this was a real footgun that bit our first run and is now handled in the test fixture.
test_credentials: Founder pair used: EK48P89X + S4YNQFPK (both founder:true, issued_by:'system'). Test phone +918108888330 used ONLY with mongo hash-injection for OTP verify — no live WhatsApp messages sent. TEST_otp_sprint@tasbih.test used as throwaway email. Guest auto-login via POST /api/auth/guest still works for backend-only auth scenarios.
seed_data_creation: Tests temporarily inserted 6 invite_codes (guest-issued) and one TEST_ user during the happy-path OTP verify, then cleaned up. db.invite_codes founder pair was reset (used_by:null) at end of happy-path test so subsequent runs are idempotent. db.chat_messages noor_moment rows for c_spiritual are cleared before the noor-moment test to avoid stale rate-limit triggers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression files: /app/backend/tests/test_sprint_invite_otp.py (current sprint, 25 tests, ~7s) and /app/backend/tests/test_phase4.py (previous sprint). For frontend protected pages, drop a guest session_token into localStorage under keys session_token + auth_token + token before navigating — invite-gate guards everything except /login. Always clear requests.Session cookies after a test that calls /api/auth/otp/verify or /api/auth/session because the backend sets an HttpOnly Cookie that takes precedence over the Bearer header in current_user (see server.py line 132).
rca of the issue: No live bugs. Only intra-test footgun: requests.Session preserves cookies and the backend prefers Cookie over Authorization header. When the happy-path test deleted the new user's session record, the cookie still pointed at a now-orphaned session_token → 401 on all downstream regression tests reusing that session. Fix applied: s.cookies.clear() after the cleanup. Backend behaviour is correct.
